description: Fix invalid object reference after related record deleted
goal: Fix GetAttachmentName to handle case where related Attachment record has been deleted
expected_behavior: GetAttachmentName should check '$IsObject(att) after %OpenId and return empty string when the attachment no longer exists.
hints: Check '$IsObject(att) after %OpenId — %OpenId returns "" (not an object) when ID not found
The fix is a 2-line addition before accessing att.FileName
Use Return not Quit for early exit from a Method
